headline: Is Southern Company Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Though Southern Company has lagged behind the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Is Duke Energy Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Duke Energy has lagged behind the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain somewhat optimistic about the stock’s growth potential.
